decks.notes: This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of powerful spells and creatures. By using cards like Abandon Attachments, Bounce Off, and Burst Lightning, the aim is to disrupt the opponent's strategy and gain advantage on the battlefield. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide solid creatures to hold off threats, while cards like Spell Pierce and Spell Snare help to counter important spells. With a mix of card draw, removal, and counter magic, this deck aims to outmaneuver the opponent and control the pace of the game until it can secure a victory.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, while using cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer to pump up their power. The deck also includes ways to protect its creatures with Meltstrider's Resolve and escape removal with cards like Escape Tunnel. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive plays and push damage through to secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Shocking+Sharpshooter','','');">Shocking Sharpshooter and Fanatical Firebrand, along with a mix of powerful creatures like Ojer Axonil and Raphael, Tough Turtle, the deck aims to quickly apply pressure and finish off the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize. With a combination of direct damage spells like Burst Lightning and Warleader's Call, as well as efficient creatures like Stadium Headliner and Howlsquad Heavy, this deck is designed to secure a swift victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures. By utilizing mana acceleration from cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, the deck aims to play high-powered creatures such as Mossborn Hydra and Earthbender Ascension as soon as possible. Additionally, the deck includes various cards like Escape Tunnel and Royal Treatment to protect and enhance its creatures, ensuring a steady stream of threats to pressure the opponent.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and spells that allow for efficient card draw and removal. By utilizing cards like Boomerang Basics, Slickshot Show-Off, and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to apply constant pressure while maintaining card advantage. The inclusion of Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter adds evasion and disruptive potential to the deck, allowing for strategic plays to outmaneuver opponents. With a focus on tempo and aggression, this UR Aggro deck aims to win through quick and relentless attacks.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by countering opponent's spells, clearing the board with removal spells like Day of Judgment and Lightning Helix, and drawing cards to maintain card advantage. It also includes a combination of powerful creatures like North Wind Avatar and Ultima to finish off the opponent. The mana base consists of various lands to ensure the deck can cast its spells efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to control the game tempo, disrupt the opponent's plans, and outvalue them in the long run.

The deck focuses on using counter spells, bounce effects, and card draw to control the game and outvalue the opponent. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan, protect its own threats, and maintain card advantage until it can overwhelm the opponent with its powerful late-game threats. The deck is designed to be able to handle a variety of different strategies and adapt to different matchups, allowing the pilot to outmaneuver their opponent and secure victory through careful resource management and strategic decision-making.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. The goal is to establish board presence early with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, then buff them with cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension to push for damage. The deck also includes some control elements like Archdruid's Charm and Royal Treatment to disrupt the opponent's strategies. Overall, the strategy is to curve out efficiently and apply pressure to force the opponent into a defensive position.

The deck focuses on using low-cost creatures and mana ramp to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive attacks. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator, the deck aims to swarm the battlefield with creatures and finish off the opponent with powerful cards like Craterhoof Behemoth and Brightglass Gearhulk. The deck also includes cards for tempo control and resource disruption, such as Multiversal Passage and Soul-Guide Lantern, to maintain the upper hand throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast mana ramp with Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator, along with powerful creatures like Ouroboroid and Brightglass Gearhulk. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Soul-Guide Lantern and Seam Rip to control the opponent's board. By utilizing cards that generate tokens like Spider Manifestation and Nurturing Pixie, as well as powerful finishers like Craterhoof Behemoth and Surrak, Elusive Hunter, the deck aims to quickly build a threatening board presence and close out the game before the opponent can establish control.

This deck focuses on utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to pressure the opponent quickly. By using efficient card draw and cheap burn spells, the player can control the board while developing their own threats. Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off provide early aggression, while Stormchaser's Talent and Riverpyre Verge help to maintain pressure. The use of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out can disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Stock Up and Hearth Elemental provide late-game reach. Multiversal Passage and Roaring Furnace / Steaming Sauna offer versatility in mana fixing and removal.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to efficiently control the board with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Elusive Otter while using spells such as Burst Lightning and Plasma Bolt to remove threats. The deck also includes card draw and mana fixing with Opt and Multiversal Passage, and adds extra damage with cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Stormchaser's Talent. The deck aims to maintain aggression and pressure on the opponent while controlling the game state to secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient and aggressive creatures such as Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. It utilizes ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to quickly develop mana sources, allowing for explosive early game plays. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional buffs to strengthen the board, while Escape Tunnel and Royal Treatment offer protection and evasion for key creatures. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, powerful creature threats and take control of the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Slickshot Show-Off, and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to establish early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game. Eddymurk Crab and Riverpyre Verge provide additional threats, while cards like Boomerang Basics and Get Out help to disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of efficient spells and creatures, this UR Aggro deck is designed to keep the pressure on and finish the game quickly.

This deck focuses on building a fast and aggressive strategy using a combination of low-cost creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Cards like Dream Beavers and Floodpits Drowner provide early game pressure, while spells such as Shoot the Sheriff and Requiting Hex help control the board and eliminate threats. Multiversal Passage and Super Shredder offer versatility and card advantage, allowing the player to maintain momentum. With a mix of evasion, disruption, and card draw, this Dimir Aggro deck aims to win the game swiftly through a combination of threats and removal.

The main concept of this deck is to establish a strong board presence early on using efficient creatures like Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator. This allows the player to ramp up quickly and overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells. The deck also includes some control elements like Seam Rip and Unable to Scream to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Craterhoof Behemoth serves as a powerful finisher, while cards like Mockingbird and Quantum Riddler provide additional synergy and card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to be fast, aggressive, and versatile in its approach.
